summary: Iteration 79: Complete testing of independent annual pricing config with validity dates (valid_from, valid_to). All 16 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend features verified working.

tests.description: Validity dates in YYYY-MM-DD format (2026-04-01 to 2027-03-31)
PUT /api/admin/subscribers/pricing-config saves valid_from and valid_to dates
Validity dates can be empty strings
Config has package_name, valid_from, valid_to, duration_months, pricing, included_programs, overall_discount_pct, default_sessions, notes
Pricing dict has INR, USD, AED, EUR, GBP
Each breakdown item has name, duration_value, duration_unit, source_tier, discount_pct, monthly_prices, calculated_prices
Config has fields for form auto-fill: package_name, pricing, included_programs, default_sessions

details: Valid From date picker field present in row 1 of basic info
Valid To date picker field present in row 1 of basic info
Valid From shows value: 2026-04-01
Valid To shows value: 2027-03-31
Date inputs use native HTML date type
Row 1: Package Name, Duration (months), Valid From, Valid To
Row 2: Default Sessions, Carry Forward, Overall Discount %, Notes
All fields editable and properly labeled
Badge shows 'Valid: 2026-04-01 to 2027-03-31' in Annual Package Pricing section
Badge styled with purple/rounded pill design
Badge positioned to the right of 'ANNUAL PACKAGE PRICING' header
Section has purple header ('ANNUAL PACKAGE PRICING')
Section has bordered box with currency inputs
Currency inputs: INR (50000), USD (600), AED (2200), EUR (550), GBP (470)
Helper text present: 'This is the independent annual package price...'
Notes field present in row 2 of basic info
Placeholder: 'Internal notes...'
Field is editable
Calculate Pricing button works
Pricing breakdown table appears after clicking
Breakdown shows: AWRP (12 months, 1,080,000.12 INR), MMM (6 months, 120,000 INR), Bi-Annual Downloads (2 sessions, 0), Quarterly Meetups (4 sessions, 0)
Apply to Package Price button present
Add Subscriber button opens form
Form shows 'Auto-filled from package config' indicator
Auto-fill uses config values for package name, pricing, programs, sessions
Validity dates persist after save
API confirms dates: valid_from=2026-04-01, valid_to=2027-03-31
Save Config shows toast notification: 'Package config saved'

seed_data_creation: None - used existing pricing config with valid_from=2026-04-01, valid_to=2027-03-31
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 tested the independent annual pricing config with validity dates feature. Key features verified: 1) GET/PUT /api/admin/subscribers/pricing-config includes valid_from and valid_to fields in YYYY-MM-DD format. 2) Admin UI shows Valid From and Valid To date pickers in the Global Annual Package Structure section (Row 1: Package Name, Duration, Valid From, Valid To; Row 2: Default Sessions, Carry Forward, Overall Discount %, Notes). 3) Validity badge shows 'Valid: YYYY-MM-DD to YYYY-MM-DD' in the Annual Package Pricing section. 4) Calculate Pricing still works (regression). 5) Subscriber form auto-fill still works (regression). 6) All other admin tabs working.
